action_set_definitions.name: get_vessel_dimensions
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the physical limits of the vessel, including the range of bays, rows, and tiers available.

vessel_id.description: Unique identifier of the cargo vessel.

action_set_definitions.name: get_bay_status
action_set_definitions.description: Returns detailed information about a specific bay, including current total power consumption, occupied slots, and the type/weight of containers in those slots.

bay_id.description: The specific bay number to query.

action_set_definitions.name: get_vessel_stability
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves current stability metrics including metacentric height (GM), trim, and list.

action_set_definitions.name: simulate_loading_impact
action_set_definitions.description: Predicts the resulting vessel list and bay power levels if a set of containers were to be loaded at specific coordinates. Does not execute the move.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_load_operation
action_set_definitions.description: Permanently loads a container into the specified slot in the vessel state.

state_description.vessel_id: Unique identifier of the cargo vessel.
state_description.stability_metrics: Calculated values for metacentric height (GM), trim (longitudinal), and list (transverse).
state_description.total_deadweight_tons: The current aggregate weight of all loaded cargo.
state_description.bay_occupancy_map: A mapping of coordinate strings 'B-R-T' to container data (ID and weight).
state_description.crane_status: The current position and operational state of the loading crane.
